declarations.description:
Purpose: To represent an option item within a list dropdown or select menu.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to display a selectable item within a dropdown or select menu.
When not to use: When you need to display a non-selectable item or a different layout.
Works with components: mc-select, mc-multi-select, mc-typeahead, mc-typeahead-multi-select
Alternative component names: Option Item, Select Item, Dropdown Item
declarations.name: McOption

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of text-and-icon wrapper
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon`

slots.description: The default slot where main label goes.
The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.
slots.name: sublabel

slots.description: The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.
slots.name: icon

slots.description: The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.
slots.name: trailingicon

slots.description: Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-button.
slots.name: `badge`
